TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == babaungen == 祭品 mipahalhal tu sapatudud i kakawsan a babaungen. siwkay nu babaungen sapakan tu Dietu, kakawsan, tuas, adingu...a kakaenan atu tuutuud. u tunuc, u dadac, u bila', u titi' nu pabuy, u lala', u ciyak, u kuwa'...canacanan. u sulit nu Hulam atu Lipun 供物 とは, を指す.
S.PHON: == babauŋən == ** mipaħar~ɾħar~ɾ tu sapatudud i kakawsan a babauŋən. siwkaj nu babauŋən sapakan tu diətu, kakawsan, tuas, adiŋu...a kakaənan atu tuutuud. u tunuʦ, u dadaʦ, u bir~ɾaʔ~ʡ, u titiʔ~ʡ nu pabuj, u r~ɾar~ɾaʔ~ʡ, u ʦijak, u kuwaʔ~ʡ...ʦanaʦanan. u sur~ɾit nu ħur~ɾam atu r~ɾipun ** **, ***.
S.FORM: == babaungen == 祭品 mipahalhal tu sapatudud i kakawsan a babaungen. siwkay nu babaungen sapakan tu Dietu, kakawsan, tuas, adingu...a kakaenan atu tuutuud. u tunuc, u dadac, u bila', u titi' nu pabuy, u lala', u ciyak, u kuwa'...canacanan. u sulit nu Hulam atu Lipun 供物 とは, を指す.
S.PHON: == babauŋən == ** mipaħar~ɾħar~ɾ tu sapatudud i kakawsan a babauŋən. siwkaj nu babauŋən sapakan tu diətu, kakawsan, tuas, adiŋu...a kakaənan atu tuutuud. u tunuʦ, u dadaʦ, u bir~ɾaʔ~ʡ, u titiʔ~ʡ nu pabuj, u r~ɾar~ɾaʔ~ʡ, u ʦijak, u kuwaʔ~ʡ...ʦanaʦanan. u sur~ɾit nu ħur~ɾam atu r~ɾipun ** **, ***.
